items.label: Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written
messages: The infra-handoff phase is complete. Here's what was accomplished:  1. **Read Terraform outputs** from the live state in `apps/sample-app/infra/` — all 14 outputs captured successfully. 2. **Created `infra-interfaces.md`** at `apps/sample-app/in-progress/infra-interfaces.md` with:    - **Endpoints** — Function App, APIM Gateway, Static Web App, Cosmos DB URLs    - **Resource Names** — all key resource identifiers    - **Auth Config** — Entra tenant/client IDs, dual-mode auth details    - **Cosmos DB context** — documents the pre-existing infrastructure from `webhook-dispatcher` and the new `Tasks` container needed    - **Full Terraform outputs table** — with `application_insights_connection_string` masked as `<HIDDEN>` (sensitive)    - **Downstream agent notes** — actionable guidance for backend-dev, frontend-dev, e2e-dev, infra-architect, and cicd-dev 3. **Committed** the interfaces file and **marked `infra-handoff` as done** in the pipeline.

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): infra-handoff interfaces"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete kanban-task-board infra-handoff
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written"
